name: Standard Issue
about: Track a feature, refactor, documentation item, or technical task
title: "Phase X - <short task title>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Objective
Describe the outcome this issue should achieve.

## Scope
- List the in-scope work items.
- Keep items implementation-focused and testable.

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

- Phase:
